_notes: Minimal Tier-1 floor: outbound network + privilege + core secrets ASK; only system-config commands hard-deny. Installers are preset-controlled (allowed by default; Balanced/Strict escalate via signed approveTokens). Signed preset bundles tighten this via deny/approveTokens.
allowlistedDomainsNotes: Exact-match only. Use '*.example.com' to allow subdomains.
